description_long: This is a bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock and a long, slender barrel, featuring a fixed bayonet attached to the muzzle. The stock is made of polished wood, showing a warm brown hue with visible grain patterns, and the metal components, including the barrel, receiver, and bayonet, are finished in a dark, matte steel. The rifle has a traditional design, with an internal magazine and iron sights mounted along the top of the barrel. The bolt handle is visible on the right side, and the trigger guard and trigger are made of metal. The bayonet extends significantly beyond the muzzle, giving the rifle an elongated profile. This type of rifle is reminiscent of early to mid-20th-century military firearms, often seen in historical or ceremonial urban contexts.
description: A classic bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock, long barrel, and fixed bayonet, featuring iron sights and metal fittings. The design is traditional, with a polished wood finish and dark steel components.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the wooden stock, long barrel, and extended bayonet.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed bayonet and the narrow profile of the barrel and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the bolt handle, trigger guard, and the full length of the rifle with bayonet.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel and bayonet.
